work items.description: Create NestJS backend project with modular structure for auth, users, steam, games, library, metadata, search, recommendations, prices, jobs, notifications and observability.
Create Docker Compose configuration for API, worker, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, Prometheus and Grafana.
Configure PostgreSQL connection, Prisma schema, migrations and initial seed structure.
Configure Redis connection for BullMQ queues, caching, rate limiting and distributed locks.
Create /health endpoint that checks API status, PostgreSQL connection, Redis connection and Elasticsearch connection.

work items.summary: Create user and refresh token models
work items.description: Add User and RefreshToken database models with email, username, password hash, Steam ID, public profile flag and timestamps.
Create registration endpoint with validation, password hashing and duplicate email handling.
Create login endpoint that validates credentials and returns JWT access token and refresh token.
Create secure refresh token rotation with token invalidation and reuse protection.
Create endpoints for fetching and updating current user profile data.
Create Steam module with API client, configuration, error handling and response mapping.
Allow user to submit Steam ID or Steam profile URL. Resolve and validate Steam profile before saving it to the user account.
Add SteamSyncJob model with status, user ID, startedAt, completedAt, error message and imported games count.
Create separate worker process for background jobs and configure BullMQ queues with Redis.
Create background job that fetches user's owned Steam games and saves imported data.
Use Redis distributed lock or active sync status to prevent multiple simultaneous Steam sync jobs for the same user.
Create endpoint that returns current Steam sync status, progress, imported count and error information if sync failed.
Add Game, GameExternalId and UserGame models to support internal games, external provider IDs and user-specific library data.

work items.summary: Map Steam games to internal game records
work items.description: Create mapping logic that converts Steam imported games into internal Game and UserGame records.
Create common metadata provider interface for IGDB or RAWG. Provider should support search by title and fetching game details.
Create background job that enriches imported games with title, description, cover, genres, platforms, developers, publishers and release date.
Use Redis to cache IGDB or RAWG metadata responses and reduce repeated external API calls.
Create endpoint for returning user's imported game library with pagination, filters and basic sorting.
Allow user to update game status: BACKLOG, PLAYING, COMPLETED, DROPPED or WISHLIST.

work items.summary: Implement personal game rating and note
work items.description: Allow user to add rating, favorite flag and personal note to a game in their library.
Return total games, completed games, backlog games, wishlist games, total playtime and top genres.
Add Elasticsearch to Docker Compose and configure connection from NestJS API and worker.
Create games_index mapping with fields for title, alternative titles, genres, platforms, developers, publishers, release year and description.
Create BullMQ job that indexes or updates game documents in Elasticsearch after PostgreSQL changes.
Create search endpoint with fuzzy search, genre filter, platform filter, release year filter and pagination.
Add Recommendation and RecommendationReason models with score, type, user ID, game ID and generated reasons.
Create scoring service based on genre match, favorite similarity, user rating signal, platform match, discount signal and popularity signal.
Create human-readable recommendation reasons such as matching favorite genres, similar completed games, high discount or wishlist presence.
Create background job that generates and stores recommendations for a user after library sync or manual regeneration.
Create endpoints for fetching user recommendations and manually triggering recommendation regeneration.

work items.summary: Create price and deal database models
work items.description: Add Store, GamePrice, PriceSnapshot and PriceAlert models.
Create common interface for price providers such as CheapShark or IsThereAnyDeal.
Fetch current game deals and prices from CheapShark and map provider response to internal price models.
Create background job that refreshes prices for wishlist, recommended and tracked games.
Create service that assigns labels such as BUY_NOW, GOOD_DEAL, HISTORICAL_LOW, WAIT, NO_DEAL_FOUND or OWNED_ALREADY.
Create endpoint for fetching current prices, best store, discount percentage and deal label for a selected game.
Allow users to create, update, disable and delete price alerts based on target price, discount percentage or historical low.
Create notification model and endpoint for showing triggered price alert notifications to the user.
Create Next.js frontend project with routing, shared layout, API client, auth state management and UI library setup.
Implement login and registration forms with validation, API integration and protected route handling.
Show library summary, top genres, recent sync status, current recommendations and wishlist deals.
Create UI for entering Steam ID or profile URL, linking Steam profile, starting sync and viewing sync status.
Display imported games with filters, pagination, status controls, rating and note editing.
Show game metadata, user status, rating, note, current prices, deal label and related recommendations.
Create Elasticsearch-powered search UI with query input, filters, sorting and pagination.
Display recommended games with score, explanation reasons and current deal information.

work items.summary: Create deals and price alerts pages
work items.description: Display current best deals and allow users to create, update and disable price alerts.
Expose /metrics endpoint with HTTP request count, request duration and error count.
Track BullMQ completed jobs, failed jobs, job duration and waiting jobs by queue.
Track request count, errors and duration for Steam, metadata provider and price provider APIs.
Create Grafana dashboards for API latency, errors, queue health, external API health, Steam syncs and price refresh jobs.

work items.summary: Add unit tests for recommendation scoring
work items.description: Cover recommendation scoring logic, recommendation types and reason generation with unit tests.

work items.summary: Add unit tests for deal decision logic
work items.description: Cover BUY_NOW, GOOD_DEAL, HISTORICAL_LOW, WAIT, NO_DEAL_FOUND and OWNED_ALREADY decision cases.

work items.summary: Add integration tests for auth flow
work items.description: Test registration, login, refresh token rotation, logout and protected routes.

work items.summary: Add integration tests for Steam sync with mocked API
work items.description: Mock Steam API responses and test Steam profile linking, sync job creation and imported game persistence.

work items.summary: Add integration tests for price refresh with mocked provider
work items.description: Mock price provider responses and test current price updates, price snapshots and deal labels.
Document project idea, architecture, local setup, environment variables, external APIs, queues, monitoring and engineering highlights.
Create CI workflow that installs dependencies, runs lint, typecheck, tests and build.
